final:
module top_down_counter_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b1111;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count - 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
